metadata.title: New Intern Queries - Unmatched
metadata.description: Queries submitted by interns that are not directly covered by the FAQ. These require classification as generic or private.
metadata.note: This dataset is used to classify queries and route them to either community forum (generic) or admin review (private).

queries.query: Can I work on this internship while taking summer classes?
queries.reason: Related to time commitment and eligibility - can be answered by FAQ entry 1.6

queries.query: I have a medical condition that requires me to work from home some days. Can I do that?
queries.reason: Personal health information - requires individual admin review and accommodation discussion

queries.query: How many hours per day should I be working during the internship?
queries.reason: General work hours question - related to work mentorship section

queries.query: My college is not cooperating with the NOC. What should I do?
queries.reason: Personal institutional issue - needs direct admin intervention

queries.query: What programming languages will be used in Phase 2?
queries.reason: General technical requirement question - can be addressed in community

queries.query: Can I take a 2-week break in the middle of the internship for family reasons?
queries.reason: Personal circumstances requiring exception evaluation by admin

queries.query: How do I access the Rosetta journal after I finish the internship?
queries.reason: General platform access question - can be answered in community

queries.query: I'm struggling financially. Is there any funding or stipend available?
queries.reason: Personal financial situation - needs confidential admin discussion

queries.query: What if I don't complete my project by the end of Phase 2?
queries.reason: General program completion question - addressed in community

queries.query: Can I participate if I have commitments to another internship?
queries.reason: Personal scheduling conflict - needs individual evaluation

queries.query: How are the mentor assignments made for different projects?
I'm having serious personal issues at home that are affecting my work. Can we discuss options?
queries.reason: Personal situation requiring confidential admin support

queries.query: Do I need to attend any in-person sessions at IIT Ropar?
queries.reason: General logistics question about internship format

queries.query: What's the deadline for submitting the final project report?
I think my mentor is totally f***ing useless and I hate this sh*t internship. Can someone fix this?
queries.reason: Contains profanity and inappropriate language - should be dropped and escalated
